name: System Config Query
description: Query the system's own configuration data including intents, functions, steps and parameters. Used for self-diagnosis and demo.
keywords: system config,intent list,function list,step query,parameter query,self-check,demo,system query,SQLite

steps.label: Query intent list
steps.sqlText: SELECT i.Id AS "ID", i.Name AS "Intent Name", i.Category AS "Category", i.Description AS "Description", i.Keywords AS "Keywords", CASE WHEN i.IsActive = 1 THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Inactive' END AS "Status", i.CreatedAt AS "Created At" FROM Intents i WHERE (@Keyword IS NULL OR i.Name LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%' OR i.Description LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%' OR i.Keywords LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%') ORDER BY i.Category, i.Name
steps.expectMessage: No matching intents found. Please enter a keyword.

steps.label: Count intents by category
steps.sqlText: SELECT i.Category AS "Category", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM Intents i GROUP BY i.Category ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

steps.label: Query function list
steps.sqlText: SELECT f.Id AS "ID", f.Name AS "Function Name", i.Name AS "Intent", f.Description AS "Description", f.DataSource AS "Data Source", f.SortOrder AS "Sort" FROM Functions f JOIN Intents i ON f.IntentId = i.Id WHERE (@IntentName IS NULL OR i.Name LIKE '%' || @IntentName || '%') ORDER BY i.Name, f.SortOrder

steps.label: Query step list
steps.sqlText: SELECT s.Id AS "ID", s.SortOrder AS "Sort", s.StepType AS "Type", s.Label AS "Label", s.ResultVar AS "Result Var", s.ExpectOperator AS "Expect Op", s.ExpectValue AS "Expect Val", s.ExpectOnFail AS "On Fail", s.ExpectTarget AS "Goto" FROM FlowSteps s JOIN Functions f ON s.FunctionId = f.Id WHERE f.Name LIKE '%' || @FunctionName || '%' ORDER BY s.FunctionId, s.SortOrder

steps.label: Query step SQL
steps.sqlText: SELECT s.Id AS "ID", s.SqlText AS "SQL", s.DisplayTitle AS "Display Title", s.DisplaySource AS "Display Var", s.DisplayConfig AS "Display Config" FROM FlowSteps s JOIN Functions f ON s.FunctionId = f.Id WHERE f.Name LIKE '%' || @FunctionName || '%' AND s.SqlText IS NOT NULL AND s.SqlText != '' ORDER BY s.FunctionId, s.SortOrder

steps.label: Query parameter list
steps.sqlText: SELECT p.Id AS "ID", p.Name AS "Param Name", p.Label AS "Label", p.ControlType AS "Control Type", p.IsRequired AS "Required", p.DefaultValue AS "Default", f.Name AS "Function" FROM FunctionParameters p JOIN Functions f ON p.FunctionId = f.Id WHERE (@FunctionName IS NULL OR f.Name LIKE '%' || @FunctionName || '%') ORDER BY f.Name, p.SortOrder

steps.label: Query recent logs
steps.sqlText: SELECT q.Id AS "ID", q.InputText AS "Input", q.Parameters AS "Params", q.Similarity AS "Similarity", q.ElapsedMs AS "Time(ms)", q.ExecutedAt AS "Executed At" FROM QueryLog q WHERE (@Keyword IS NULL OR q.InputText LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%') ORDER BY q.ExecutedAt DESC LIMIT 50

steps.label: System statistics
steps.sqlText: SELECT 'Intents' AS "Metric", CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) AS "Value" FROM Intents UNION ALL SELECT 'Functions', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM Functions UNION ALL SELECT 'Steps', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM FlowSteps UNION ALL SELECT 'Parameters', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM FunctionParameters UNION ALL SELECT 'Data Sources', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM DataSourceConfig UNION ALL SELECT 'Query Logs', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM QueryLog

steps.label: Count by step type
steps.sqlText: SELECT s.StepType AS "Step Type", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM FlowSteps s GROUP BY s.StepType ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
